title: taraxacum gladiolare
intro: Taraxacum gladiolare, also known as the Italian dandelion or hawkbit, is a species of flowering plant in the dandelion family, Taraxacaceae. It is primarily recognized for its medicinal properties, which include its ability to stimulate digestion and relieve liver and kidney issues. The plant is rich in vitamins A, B, C, and K, as well as minerals like potassium, iron, and calcium, providing various health benefits, such as improving immune function and reducing inflammation. Taraxacum gladiolare can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, capsules, and tinctures, which are often used to support liver health and alleviate digestive issues.
